user.title: Add freezer inventory
user.description: Create a storage-backed freezer inventory that the custom card can use directly.

add_item.name: Add item
add_item.description: Add an item to the freezer inventory.

date.name: Date
date.description: Optional display date stored with the item.

remove_item.name: Remove item
remove_item.description: Remove an item from the freezer inventory.

item_id.name: Item ID
item_id.description: The internal item ID to remove.

clear_inventory.name: Clear inventory
clear_inventory.description: Remove all items from the freezer inventory.
